bonuses.stat:
Gain Herald of Spring, causing your Green Balance overheals to apply Minor Heroism for 3 seconds. 

Casting a Heal ability while Bracing consumes Herald of Spring and gives you Harbinger of Fall for 6 seconds, causing your Green Balance overheals to create an 8 meter area for 5 seconds, applying Major Cowardice to enemies and Minor Vitality to allies. You can create an area once every 5 seconds.

When Harbinger of Fall ends, regain Herald of Spring.
